_meta.description:
Per-module third-party integration track-record qualifiers (IMDA "[EDGE ERP]
<Module> Module" 101-block). Vendor demonstrates real integration experience.
_meta.source:
IMDA integration block, captured 2026-06-08 from the Finance-module
screenshot (rows 101, 101.1, 101.2, 101.3, 101.4). Qualifier wording is
IMDA-verbatim. The Sector qualifier options are the 14 PSG sectors,
derived at build time from config/psg_sectors.yaml (single source of
truth) rather than the partial list shown in the screenshot.

umbrella.title: Integration Services
umbrella.question: Do you provide integration services to other {module} modules?
umbrella.body: You provide the capability to integrate to {module}-type modules or applications provided by other software providers.

qualifiers.title: Overall Integration Track Record Qualifier
qualifiers.body:
Do you have at least 1 completed project proposal that includes the following information?

1) Scope of work clearly indicating the integration of the module or application
2) Clear proof of project completion (e.g. signed handover form, signed completion letter, etc.)

Note 1: Please ensure that all project proposals are for companies based in Singapore
Note 2: Please ensure that at least 1 of your own software module that you've submitted for this application, is listed in the proposal

qualifiers.title: Project Completion Track Record Qualifier
qualifiers.body:
Please indicate the page number for the proof of project completion.

Click "Yes" to confirm you have completed the instruction(s).

qualifiers.title: Sector Record Qualifier
qualifiers.body: Please indicate the industry(s) of the client, to the best of your knowledge.

qualifiers.title: Brand & Software Integration Track Record Qualifier
qualifiers.body:
Please clearly indicate ALL (1) brand(s) & (2) software name(s) of the module(s) and/or application(s) that you are able to integrate to.

Click "Yes" to confirm you have completed the instruction(s).
